message:
test(bidi): expand from 4 to 42 unit tests for Unicode BiDi algorithm (wa-25num)

Add 38 new tests covering Direction (with_level, opposite, as_bidi_class,
iter LTR/RTL, Clone/Eq/Debug), Level (default, direction, as_bidi_class,
removed_by_x9, max, Ord, Hash), ParagraphDirectionHint (default, direction
for all 4 variants, Clone/Eq/Debug), BidiRun.indices (no removals, with
removals, empty range, Clone/Eq), BidiContext (pure LTR single run and
identity reorder, pure RTL single run and reversed reorder, mixed text
multiple runs, auto-detect for Latin/Hebrew, line_runs subset,
reordered_runs identity, set_reorder_non_spacing_marks), ReorderedRun
(Debug/Clone/Eq), and bidi_class_for_char (digits, Arabic, punctuation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
